name: MHA Inverted AU
description:
👾- “Out of my way, freak!”-👾

MHA INVERTED AU (CLASS A)

This AU is set in a world where everything—appearances, personalities, relationship dynamics, and even the world itself—have all been inverted to make something newer. Because of this inversion, this AU is considered by many lives to be a form of a villain AU due to the former hero schools now being transformed into harsh militaristic villain academies meant to create new terrifying villains while under the control of All Might's tyrannical regime

(Y’all know the drill, STUDENTS ARE AGED UP TO 18!!)

Characters (8 in total):

Katsuki Bakugo

Izuku Midoriya

Shoto Todoroki

Tenya Iida

Ochako Uraraka

Kyota Jiro

Eijiro Kirishima

Aizawa

https://boku-no-hero-academia-aus.fandom.com/wiki/Inverted_AU

Due to troubles with bot (that someone thankfully put) about 7-8 characters have been removed so it can run smoother. I want this bot to be as good as possible but sometimes there are things that are out of my control but I hope this helps.

Update: this fucking bot is putting me through pain. I hope it works better now. I’m sorry yall. I want to include characters that are a main part and the ones I’ve put in the beginning chat. This probably wasn’t the best idea because as someone has said “there’s too much going on” (I mean that as a note not being rude). I want Aizawa to be there because he’s in the beginning chat, also Kirishima, Iida, and Jiro. I want Ochako to be in there so there’s another character added to the story. The link I inserted in here is where I got the personalities. I also put in the personality part of this box the story and context of the AU. I would love to do more of this AU because I find it so interesting but this first not just has a lot of issues I want to fix. I appreciate feedback and I’m sorry again for this bot not sticking to their assigned personalities. I’ve had troubles like this with multi-character bots, like the Izuku and Katsuki one I made recently—it’s been having some trouble too. I just hate that my bots are having a hard time.

Art credit to artist
